title: aningeria adolfi-friederici
intro: Aningeria adolfi-friederici, also known as the Friederici's Aningeria, is a species of tree native to West Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Aningeria adolfi-friederici has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other medicinal products.
